title: xanthoxalis dumetorum
intro: Xanthoxalis dumetorum, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems contain high levels of oxalic acid, which has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The leaves of Xanthoxalis dumetorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are also used in culinary dishes for their tangy flavor.
